  • Processor: 1 GHz single core processor, x86 architecture

  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection

specification.recommended:

  • OS: Windows® 10/11 (32 or 64 bit)
  • Processor: 2 GHz dual or more core processor, x86 architecture (SMT is acceptable)
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 256MB video card with pixel shaders and great OpenGL 2.1 support, particularly in immediate mode
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any DirectSound or WASAPI compatible sound output with high definition support.
  • Additional Notes: Dual core processor will improve performance of the sound, particle, and networking features. Steam system requirements, current and future, will always be a factor. (Lowest common denominator.)

specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows Vista x86 SP2 with DirectX 11 Update Installed, Windows 7 or Windows 8
  • Processor: Intel Core 2 Duo E4600 or AMD Athlon 64 X2 4800+
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Radeon HD 5450 (1 GB) or GeForce GT 430 (1 GB)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX compatible sound card
  • Additional Notes: There is no support for Windows XP or DirectX 9 and below.

title: Nancy Drew®: Ghost of Thornton Hall

specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *:Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • Processor:1.5 GHZ or greater Pentium 4 CPU or equivalent class
  • Memory:512 MB RAM
  • Graphics:128 MB DirectX 9.0 compatible video card
  • Hard Drive:3 GB HD space
  • Sound:9.0

Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows XP, Windows Vista, Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 8.1
  • Processor: Intel Core 2 Duo E6600 @ 2.4 Ghz or AMD Athlon 64 X2 5000+ @2.6 Ghz
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nVidia 8800 / ATi Radeon HD 3870 with 512MB or Laptop integrated Intel HD 3000 with 3GB system ram
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX 9 Compatible
  • Additional Notes:
    • Requires a 1024x768 screen resolution.
    • Requires an open IPv4 connection for online multiplayer.
    • A Triumph Account is required to use the game's online services. The game's single player and Hot Seat modes are fully playable using the guest account.
    • Please note that the Editor is Windows only.
